name: CheckItem
goal: Single checklist row carrying a checkbox and rich-content default slot; used as a slot child inside ce-checklist or standalone.
description: Carries id, checked, and category attributes. Default slot accepts rich content — links, chips, code, dates — per CDR-002. When nested inside ce-checklist the parent reads attributes via DOM and renders the slot HTML; the item itself renders nothing (display:contents). Standalone renders a single checkbox + label row.

props.name: id
props.description: Item identifier; used by ce-checklist for toggle/persist keying.

props.name: category
props.description: Optional grouping label; used by ce-checklist group-by="category" to render section headers.

events.name: ce-check-item-change
events.description: Fired in standalone mode when the checkbox is toggled.

slots.description: Item text and optional rich content: <a>, <code>, <ce-chip>, <time>, or any inline element per CDR-002.

cssVariables.name: --ce-space-2
cssVariables.description: Gap between checkbox and label in standalone mode.

cssVariables.name: --ce-text
cssVariables.description: Label text color in standalone mode.

cssVariables.name: --ce-muted
cssVariables.description: Done item text color (line-through) in standalone mode.

cssVariables.name: --ce-text-base
cssVariables.description: Label font size in standalone mode.

cssVariables.name: --ce-color-blue
cssVariables.description: Checkbox accent color in standalone mode.

a11y.notes: In standalone mode renders a native checkbox with aria-checked reflecting the checked state. The default slot carries the accessible label. When nested inside ce-checklist the parent handles all ARIA — the item renders nothing.
